---
name: Overlay Enhancement
about: Request improvements or fixes for overlay components
title: "[OVERLAY] "
labels: overlay, enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Which Overlay?

- [ ] Score-Box
- [ ] Map-Screen
- [ ] Commentator-Box
- [ ] Info-Box
- [ ] New Overlay (not yet implemented)

## Current Behavior / Issue

Describe what the overlay currently does or what problem exists:

## Desired Behavior

What should the overlay display or do? How should it look/behave?

## Mock-up / Example

- Sketch or screenshot showing the desired overlay layout
- Reference to similar overlays or external examples
- CSS/styling suggestions (if applicable)

## Technical Details

**Frontend:**

- Angular component path (if known)
- SignalR data that should be displayed
- Styling approach (CSS, SCSS)

**Backend:**

- What data does this overlay need?
- Existing endpoints or data models?
- New database fields needed?

## Integration Points

- [ ] Needs Control Panel controls
- [ ] Needs new database fields
- [ ] Needs new SignalR messages
- [ ] Needs CSS/styling updates
- [ ] Needs OBS browser source configuration docs

## Impact

- **Frequency:** How often would this overlay be used?
- **Priority:** Low / Medium / High
- **Complexity:** Simple / Medium / Complex

## Related

- Links to related issues
- Reference to tournament/event requirements
- Any existing discussions

## Additional Context

Any other information about the overlay or use case:
